across the board from evergreen content to landing pages to blog content.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the SEO strategy for the upcoming website replatform.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Website Replatform:** Abnormal is replatforming from Craft to Contentstack, targeting a **March 1st go-live**. This expedited timeline requires immediate SEO collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [**SEO Focus:** The replatform is a chance to fix major SEO issues (e.g., no prior evergreen SEO, poor Core Web Vitals) and implement a comprehensive strategy, including keyword research and schema markup.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The content team will create a new framework to ensure a unified strategy across all content types. Blog content may be scaled back to simplify the difficult migration.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**GrowthX Role:** GrowthX will provide SEO support, starting with keyword strategy, to help Abnormal achieve its primary goals: increasing traffic (Abdallah) and improving conversion (Meaghan).](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Topics

### Website Replatform & Timeline

  - [Abnormal is replatforming from Craft CMS to Contentstack.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Contentstack offers a scalable, efficient CMS with better content governance and guardrails.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [The go-live date is **March 1st**, an expedited timeline from the initial June/July estimate.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Current SEO & Content Issues

  - [**SEO:** No prior SEO on evergreen content; a recent Screaming Frog audit confirmed significant technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Disorganized:** Two separate glossaries (AI and general) create a poor user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Fragmented:** The content team was not involved in the last redesign, resulting in a disconnected strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
      - [**Migration Risk:** Blog content is the most difficult to migrate, prompting consideration of scaling it back.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

### SEO & Content Strategy for the New Site

  - [The replatform is a strategic opportunity to implement a full SEO and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [**SEO Improvements:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [**Technical:** Better Core Web Vitals → improved indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [**On-Page:** New templates and modules for schema markup (e.g., FAQ schema).](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [**Site Structure:** Stronger sitemaps.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [Develop a unified content framework (evergreen, landing pages, blog).](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [Create multi-series blog content for the new site.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
      - [Consolidate the two glossaries into one.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**CRO:** Meaghan will develop a Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) framework to improve user journeys.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### GrowthX Collaboration

  - [GrowthX will provide SEO support throughout the replatform.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Initial Focus:** Keyword strategy, as Abnormal has not performed this internally.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX will review pages and provide recommendations; Abnormal will share its site map for this work.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Meaghan:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [Finalize CMS selection (Contentstack is 99% confirmed).](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
      - [Share the site map with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [Develop the CRO framework.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [**Meaghan & Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [Collaborate on the new content framework.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
      - [Begin keyword strategy work upon receiving the site map.](https://fathom.video/share/-ez7yEAyyk5xizuz5cxxUShHsfPN2yCB?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

action_items.description: Draft CRO framework for new site
Complete site map (Screaming Frog vs Craft); share w/ GrowthX for keyword strategy
